Renting tends to be better when:

- You value flexibility or want to invest the difference

- How long you plan to stay in the area (under ~5 years often favors renting)
- Local rent vs. home prices in your market
- Your savings, income stability, and debt
- Whether you want flexibility or to build equity
- Current mortgage rates

If you share some of those details, I can give you a much more useful answer. Or if you truly just want a gut-check: renting is often the smart default when you're uncertain, since it's the more reversible choice.
